home.card.cli.text.message: Add commands, contexts and completion without touching the base platform.

home.card.dhcp.text.message: Customize the DHCPv4 and DHCPv6 subscriber emulation.

home.card.telemetry.text.message: Control optical diagnostics and synthetic telemetry records.

home.title.message: Customize the behavior. Keep the platform.

home.subtitle.message: A public overlay to adapt the eCLI, ONU DHCP, optics and IPFIX on top of a stable OLT image.
